text:
Created attachment 222227
Update to version 3.11.10

Update to version 3.11.10.
SVN patch attached.

This patch includes the patch for, and hence supersedes, bug #252610.

Updated maven repo must be manually copied to distfiles for patch testing and uploaded to LOCAL as part of the commit process. It is available at the following link:
https://drive.google.com/uc?id=1_12eO7nl0-Rl1FyvSVNPyqYsU555EfIH&export=download
